channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Spain and Barcelona great Iniesta announces retirement after 22-year career
item.description: Andrés Iniesta, who scored Spain's World Cup-winning goal in 2010 and was one of the key players who made Barcelona's tiki-taka thrive for so long, announced his retirement from soccer on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: TALES AZZONI, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Bill introduced to award 1980 'Miracle On Ice' US hockey team with Congressional Gold Medals
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A bill was introduced in the U.S. House of Representatives on Tuesday to award Congressional Gold Medals to the 1980 “Miracle on Ice” Olympic hockey team that defeated the heavily favored Soviet Union in Lake Placid, New York, at a period of high tension during the Cold War.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Woman accusing Vince McMahon of sexual abuse asks WWE to waive confidentiality agreements
item.description: A woman who accused former WWE chief Vince McMahon of sexual battery and trafficking in a lawsuit is now asking him and the wrestling company to waive nondisclosure agreements with other current and former employees and contractors.
item.dc:creator: Dave Collins, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: For the Panthers, the day the Stanley Cup was won was somehow normal and marked by confidence
item.description: SUNRISE, Fla. (AP) — A new season for the Florida Panthers has arrived, after the shortest possible offseason that was spent celebrating a Stanley Cup championship. What happened on the ice on the night of June 24 was something that neither the Panthers nor the Edmonton Oilers will ever forget.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Judge and Rodón unable to deliver as Yankees drop Game 2 to Royals in ALDS
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Two games into this postseason, those big-money deals for Aaron Judge and Carlos Rodón haven't paid any October dividends for the New York Yankees.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Saints quarterback Derek Carr leaves with oblique injury in another losing night against the Chiefs
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Saints quarterback Derek Carr was having another tough time against the Chiefs even before he took a wicked shot from blitzing defensive back Chamarri Conner on Monday night, not only ending his game but also New Orleans' hopes of a comeback.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: NCAA's $2.78 billion settlement with colleges to allow athlete payments gets preliminary approval
item.description: A judge granted preliminary approval Monday to the $2.78 billion legal settlement that would transform college sports by allowing schools to pay players. U.S.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Aaron Rodgers needs to step up as Jets remain stagnant
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- The Jets are 2-3. All the criticism is justified. They do not appear to be a group that is getting better week in and week out, they look to be rotting away. Talk of the relationship between the head coach Robert Saleh and quarterback Aaron Rodgers.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Ex-Yankees star Joba Chamberlain offers sound advice on how to deal with midges before Guardians-Tigers game
item.description: Former New York Yankees star Joba Chamberlain offered advice to players in the Guardians-Tigers series on how to deal with annoying pests on Lake Erie.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Billie Jean King named grand marshal for the 136th Rose Parade on Jan. 1
item.description: PASADENA, Calif. (AP) — Tennis great Billie Jean King will preside over the 136th Rose Parade as grand marshal next year.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: What is Freddie Freeman's status for NLDS Game 3?
item.description: Perhaps the most understated but significant development in Sunday night’s emotionally charged National League Division Series game between San Diego and Los Angeles was the departure of Dodgers first baseman Freddie Freeman.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KTLA 5

item.title: Sun visit the Lynx as teams square off in decisive Game 5 with trip to the WNBA Finals on the line
item.description: UNCASVILLE, Conn. (AP) — The Connecticut Sun are no strangers to needing a win in Minnesota to advance in the playoffs. The Sun eliminated the Lynx in the first round last season with a victory at Minnesota in the decisive Game 3. They're in a similar position one year later.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cowboys' Jourdan Lewis blasts George Pickens after Steelers star grabs his facemask in loss: 'Weak'
item.description: Dallas Cowboys cornerback Jourdan Lewis put Pittsburgh Steelers' George Pickens on blast after his team's win, saying the receiver is "weak.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Real Salt Lake clinches home playoff game with 1-0 victory
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - Real Salt Lake will be home for the playoffs, at least in the first round. RSL (15-7-11) extended its five-game unbeaten run with a 1-0 win away at San Jose, as Zac MacMath recorded his second straight clean sheet in goal.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: NASCAR playoffs roll into Talladega as cloud of lawsuit hangs over sport
item.description: It's most fitting that NASCAR this weekend races at Talladega Superspeedway, the sight of one of the first major disputes between drivers and the top stock car series in the United States.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Bears vs. Panthers: What to know for Sunday's Week 5 matchup at Soldier Field
item.description: Carolina (1-3) at Chicago (2-2) Sunday, Noon, Fox UPDATE: The Bears announced their list of inactives, via their X feed. They are WR Velus Jones Jr., FB Khari Blasingame, DL Zacch Pickens, DB Terrell Smith and DL Dominique Robinson.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: The Big Sho: Ohtani hits tying 3-run homer in playoff debut for the Los Angeles Dodgers in NLDS win
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani rewrote the record book during his first season with the Los Angeles Dodgers. Now, he's getting a chance to make more history in his highly anticipated playoff debut.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Padres fandom in full force at first of three postseason watch parties
item.description: The Padres' quest for postseason glory continues and fans are along for the thrilling journey. Despite Saturday night's game being held in Los Angeles at Dodgers Stadium, the first of three watch parties kicked off with a packed house at Petco Park.
item.dc:creator: Jennifer Franco, Fox 5

item.title: Washington pulls away in 4th quarter to beat No. 10 Michigan 27-17 in title game rematch
item.description: Washington quarterback Will Rogers watched the final seconds tick away and wondered if the field at Husky Stadium was about to be flooded with purple.
item.dc:creator: TIM BOOTH, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Verdugo's go-ahead single and acrobatic catch lift Yankees over Royals 6-5 in ALDS opener
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Alex Verdugo hit a tiebreaking single in the seventh inning and saved at least one run with a sliding catch along the left-field line, boosting the New York Yankees over the Kansas City Royals 6-5 on Saturday night in their AL Division Series opener.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Lane Thomas hits 3-run homer, Cleveland's bullpen torments Tigers as Guardians win ALDS opener 7-0
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Lane Thomas hit a three-run homer in a five-run outburst before Detroit got an out, and the Cleveland Guardians unleashed their lights-out bullpen to complete a four-hitter in a 7-0 win over the Tigers in an AL Division Series opener on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mets use another October rally to score 5 runs in 8th and top Phillies 6-2 in Game 1 of NLDS
item.description: Mark Vientos and Brandon Nimmo keyed another late New York comeback, helping the Mets break through for five runs in the eighth inning against a pair of All-Star relievers as they rallied past the Philadelphia Phillies 6-2 on Saturday in Game 1 of their National League Division Series.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ludmila scores in third straight game as Chicago Red Stars down Houston Dash 2-0
item.description: Ludmila scored a goal and earned a penalty shot as the Chicago Red Stars beat the Houston Dash 2-0 on Friday night at Shell Energy Stadium. Ludmila headed in Mallory Pugh's free kick in the 8th minute to get things started. It was the third straight game she had scored a goal.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Real Salt Lake plays Minnesota to scoreless draw
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - After scoring eight goals in its last three games, Real Salt Lake was unable to find the back of the net in a scoreless draw with Minnesota Wednesday night at America First Field.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Joe Musgrove exits early with apparent injury in Braves-Padres game
item.description: San Diego Padres right-hander Joe Musgrove and Atlanta Braves left-hander Max Fried both had early exits due to apparent injuries Wednesday night in Game 2 of their NL Wild Card Series.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5
